summary: Made two surgical seam edits: anchored the opening more directly to the naming aftermath from Chapter 10, and added a brief pattern-counting note in Leni's journal to hand off more cleanly to Chapter 12's counting logic.
edits: Adjusted the opening description of Tomas's altered breathing to point directly back to Jin's naming scene that afternoon.
Added a single sentence to Leni's journal reflection so the observed manifestations begin to read as an accumulating pattern before Chapter 12.
